description_long: This is a two-seater sofa with a modern, boxy silhouette and a low profile. The main body is upholstered in a dark, likely synthetic or velvet-like fabric, contrasted by a large, draped plaid blanket covering the backrest and part of the seat. A single matching plaid cushion is placed on the right side of the seat, adding a touch of comfort and visual interest. The armrests are broad, flat, and slightly curved, providing ample support and a contemporary look. The sofa sits on short, blocky legs that are mostly obscured by the upholstery, giving it a grounded appearance. The overall design is simple yet inviting, suitable for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or residential sidewalks.
description: A modern, dark-upholstered two-seater sofa with a plaid blanket draped over the backrest and a matching cushion. It features broad, flat armrests and a low, boxy profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's wide seat, plaid blanket over the backrest, and a single plaid cushion on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's armrest profile and the way the blanket drapes over the backrest and seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full coverage of the plaid blanket over the backrest and the sofa's solid, unadorned back.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the armrest and the placement of the plaid cushion, as well as the blanket's drape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large seat cushion and a continuous backrest covered by a plaid blanket, with a single loose plaid cushion on the right side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, flat armrests at seat height, slightly curved on top, fully upholstered in dark fabric with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, mostly hidden by the upholstery, likely made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest fully covered by a plaid blanket, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Main upholstery is solid dark fabric, while the blanket and cushion feature a plaid pattern in gray and white tones.
